output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?breed ?breedLabel WHERE {
  ?breed wdt:P31 wd:Q4315252 ; rdfs:label ?breedLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?breedLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(regex(?breedLabel , 'pomeranian' , 'i'))
}
LIMIT 1
output.formatted:
Pomeranian

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?breed ?breedLabel WHERE {
  ?breed wdt:P31 wd:Q4315252 ; rdfs:label ?breedLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?breedLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(regex(?breedLabel , 'pomeranian' , 'i'))
}
LIMIT 1
```

Got no rows and 2 columns
